name: Lewis Park
title: Account Manager | iGaming & Payment
summary: Head of Wallet Operations mindset with proven success stabilizing $20M+/month crypto payment flows, owning deposit/withdrawal resiliency, and orchestrating PSP + compliance + engineering triage for multi-brand services. I build wallet governance that keeps CEX-style uptime at 99.9%, sharpens RG/KYC exception controls, and translates complex alerts into strategic product and business-growth actions across regulated landscapes.

experience.title: Lead Crypto Payments & B2B Operations
key_outcomes: Kept $20M+/month deposits and withdrawals flowing across six brands with 99.9% wallet uptime through 24/7 monitoring and structured escalation ownership.
Aligned PSP, compliance, and engineering partners to resolve internal alerts, enforce RG/KYC rules, and close payment exceptions with zero user-impact breaches.
Drove fee optimization and process automation that translated into ~$1M in annual cost savings while clearing the path for new B2B wallet services.
responsibilities: Owned implementation and live operations of NPay.io wallet infrastructure, coordinating node stability, signing services, and multi-channel deposits/withdrawals.
Coordinated transaction monitoring, risk mitigation, and structured escalation workflows to keep on-chain settlement delays below SLA thresholds.
Maintained cross-brand reporting, documentation, and governance artifacts to support internal auditors and regulators.
Led payment exception reviews spanning closed-loop compliance, RG limits, KYC status, and gameplay activity to protect funds and uphold Chain-of-Trust at scale.

experience.title: Product Operational Specialist
key_outcomes: Delivered a stable MVP for blockchain-based betting with zero wallet outage during launch, anchoring deposits, withdrawals, and node testing in the first 90 days.
Standardized onboarding, activation, and transaction monitoring playbooks so CS teams could resolve wallet inquiries within the first response window.
responsibilities: Led MVP launch and live wallet operations for blockchain betting products (baccarat & racing), coordinating cross-functional launch checklists.
Managed payment integration, including custody models and signing services, and stabilized early production via automation and incident triage.
Coordinated issue resolution with engineering to keep wallet infrastructure aligned with product SLAs and user experience goals.

experience.title: Corporate Strategy
responsibilities: Supported portfolio planning and live-ops performance tracking
Contributed to partnership and licensing evaluations

experience.title: Marketing Manager
responsibilities: Communication across Turkey, MENA, and SEA
